note: Public-domain Hebrew children's-song lines, verified. When a newly-glossed word appears here, attach the matching line as a `canon` example. Grow this list with more PD songs (authors d. before ~1956).

lines.he: יונתן הקטן רץ בבוקר אל הגן
lines.en: Little Jonathan ran to the garden in the morning

lines.he: על העץ הוא טיפס, אפרוחים חיפש
lines.en: He climbed the tree, looked for chicks
Sit by me on the palm of my hand

lines.he: שב תנוח, אל תירא, ותעוף בחזרה
lines.en: Sit, rest, don't be afraid, and fly back
